generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how overblown civil defense programs drain resources from real national security. We need to focus on proven deterrence strategies, not waste money on panic rooms and stockpiles that do more harm than good. Our allies are counting on us to be smart with defense spending. #NationalSecurityFirst
